overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval city environment. The journey transitions from a sunlit canal-side path through a dark torch-lit tunnel and emerges into a bustling market square.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side cobblestone walkway with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal-side path toward the stone archway tunnel entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the tunnel entrance ahead
water canal running alongside the cobblestone path
stone wall with grass top bordering the right side of the path
medieval half-timbered houses with wooden beams and plaster facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit cobblestone path beside a canal, approaching a large stone archway tunnel. Medieval half-timbered buildings line the left side while a stone retaining wall borders the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone tunnel entrance with torch lighting

events.description: moving from outdoor canal path into covered stone tunnel
entering the dark tunnel, transitioning from natural sunlight to torch-lit interior

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark tunnel entrance, transitioning from bright daylight to dim interior

entered.detail: arched stone ceiling of the tunnel extending into darkness
rough stone walls of the tunnel interior
burning torches mounted on the tunnel walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Entering the dark stone tunnel, transitioning from bright daylight to dim torch-lit interior. The vaulted stone ceiling and rough walls enclose the path as the canal and outdoor buildings disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit tunnel interior with vaulted stone ceiling

events.description: passing by a standing guard NPC in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark tunnel, passing a guard standing against the wall near the exit

notable_agents.action: guard wearing a red hat and coat standing against the tunnel wall

entered.detail: stack of wooden barrels against the tunnel wall
bright exit archway at the far end of the tunnel showing daylight

segments.scene_description: Walking through the torch-lit tunnel interior, passing wooden barrels stacked against the wall. A guard stands watch near the tunnel exit as the bright archway ahead signals the way out.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy path between wooden fences leading to village square

events.description: emerging from tunnel into open grassy area with scattered trees
exiting the tunnel back into bright daylight

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel into a sunlit grassy area with wooden fences and trees

entered.detail: grass-covered dirt path leading away from tunnel exit
wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path
leafy green trees providing shade along the path
tall stone spires and towers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a sunlit grassy area with scattered trees and wooden fences. The path leads toward a village square with half-timbered buildings visible ahead and distant towers on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy medieval market square with stalls and villagers

events.description: entering the crowded market square with many villagers and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy market square navigating between villagers and market stalls

notable_agents.action: villager in green dress walking through the market crowd
merchant standing by a wooden market stall

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with canvas awnings displaying goods
construction scaffolding on the side of a half-timbered building

segments.scene_description: Entering a bustling medieval market square filled with villagers browsing wooden market stalls. The camera navigates through the dense crowd between half-timbered buildings and construction scaffolding.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright canal-side path through a dark subterranean passage and into a bustling medieval market. It begins along a sunlit cobblestone walkway lined with half-timbered buildings and a stone retaining wall, moving steadily toward a large stone archway. As the camera enters the tunnel, the bright daylight vanishes, shifting into a dim, torch-lit interior with vaulted ceilings and wooden barrels stacked against rough stone walls. The scene then opens as the camera passes a guard and emerges from the archway into a sunlit grassy area with scattered trees and distant towers on the horizon. Finally, the path leads directly into a crowded village square, navigating through a dense throng of villagers and wooden market stalls nestled between timbered houses and construction scaffolding.
